prompt: Question: How does an API help an order system ask a payment system to do work? A. It gives both systems a stable contract for requests and replies. B. It improves cooperation only by making the message longer. C. It works by hiding every command from both machines. D. It removes the need for any agreed format. Answer with only A, B, C, or D.
